notes: v0.15.5 — UNEQUIP NOW WORKS. X-button and the UNEQUIP / LEAVE EMPTY option in the side dock actually clear the slot (previously _equip_module rejected empty module IDs, so the click was a silent no-op). Empty slots stay empty across saves now too (used to auto-refill with the starter module on the next load). COSMETICS moved to its own nav page (sidebar entry between MODULES and TUTORIAL) so the MODULES screen has full breathing room. The live composite preview now uses the EXACT in-game render code — ship trail = combatant.gd::draw_trail() (fading circles at alpha 0.35), bullets = bullet.gd::_draw() (trail samples + 2 halo rings + white core + colored inner, no polygon chevrons), shield = pulsing arc ring. Ship drifts in a slow figure-8 so the trail actually shows. Windows only.
